_note: Honest per-sequence baseline for FusionCore NCLT regression tracking. This is NOT the published marketing table: it is the reference the regression checker (tools/check_benchmark_regression.py) diffs new runs against, so a change that helps one sequence but hurts another is caught the same day instead of drifting silently for weeks. Numbers are FusionCore ATE RMSE in metres, SE3-aligned to RTK ground truth. Regenerate a sequence entry from its results/metrics.json (produced by tools/evaluate.py --json).
_status: PARTIAL. Only 3 of 12 NCLT sequences are staged on this machine, so only these are tracked. A controlled full-suite re-run on current main is still owed before any published number is updated. 'verified' marks a run confirmed on the recorded commit; 'provisional' entries were measured mid-investigation and should be re-run under a controlled current-main config before being trusted.

2013-04-05.note: FusionCore wins by 93%. Regressed from a 2026-05-19 snapshot (12.1 m) via a heading-observability change in the intervening window; cause narrowed, not pinned. See BENCHMARK_INTEGRITY.md.

2012-06-15.note: Provisional. Long-blackout loss (RL's 2D model drifts less). Re-run under controlled current-main config to promote to verified.

2012-08-20.note: Provisional. Long-blackout loss. gnss.max_speed gate targets this sequence's outlier cluster, so its score is config-sensitive; re-run to promote to verified.
